programs.title: EastEnders
programs.desc: It's election day, and Ian and Elaine are anxiously awaiting the results. Nicola tries to support George, and Max's jealousy mounts.

programs.title: Race Across the World
programs.desc: With the leaderboard closer than ever, all four teams leave Zaamin National Park and race towards the next checkpoint, Almaty, Kazakhstan's former Soviet-era capital.

programs.desc: The week closes with the third quarter-final as the six best cooks of the week return, taking on two more challenges to prove they have the nerve and skill to go even further.

programs.title: Would I Lie to You?
